g.text: einops.rearrange(X @ Wq, 'b s d -> b s d_k')
einsum: 'b s_q s_k, b s_k d_v -> b s_q d_v'

text.tspan: heads, 'b s h d_v -> b s (h d_v)')

div.p: B = Batch size S = Sequence length (${seq_len}) D = Model dimension (${d_model}) d_k = Key dimension (${d_k}) d_v = Value dimension (${d_v}) h = Number of heads (${n_heads}) D = h × d_k = ${n_heads} × ${d_k} = ${d_model}
Attention(Q, K, V) = softmax(QKᵀ/√d_k) V Where:

ul.li: QKᵀ : [B, S, d_k] @ [B, d_k, S] → [B, S, S]
Final: [B, S, S] @ [B, S, d_v] → [B, S, d_v]
